lines.en: Dad, can you tell me a story before I go to sleep?
lines.zh: 爸爸，我睡前能给我讲个故事吗？

lines.en: Of course. What kind of story do you want?
lines.zh: 当然可以。你想听什么故事？

lines.en: A story about a brave little rabbit!
lines.zh: 一个勇敢的小兔子的故事！

lines.en: Once upon a time, there was a little rabbit named Ruby.
lines.zh: 从前，有一只小兔子叫露比。

lines.en: Yes. One day, she found a lost bird in the forest.
lines.zh: 很勇敢。有一天，她在森林里发现了一只迷路的小鸟。

lines.en: She was scared but she still helped the bird find its way home.
lines.zh: 她很害怕，但还是帮小鸟找到了回家的路。

lines.en: She is so brave! I want to be like Ruby.
lines.zh: 她真勇敢！我想像露比一样。

lines.en: You are brave too. Now close your eyes and sleep well.
lines.zh: 你也很勇敢。现在闭上眼睛，好好睡吧。
